title: OMS Provided Config
description: Pilot-managed provided config for the OMS service. Bootstrap-owned fields such as oms_id, grpc_host, grpc_port, nats_url, bootstrap_token, instance_type, and env are not part of this schema.

redis_url.description: Redis connection URL for OMS caches and supporting state.

pg_url.description: Postgres connection URL for OMS persistence.

handle_external_orders.description: Whether OMS should accept and track exchange orders not originally submitted through this OMS.

risk_check_enabled.description: Enable built-in OMS pre-trade risk checks.

max_pending_reports.description: Maximum number of entries retained in the pending order-report cache.

max_cached_orders.description: Maximum number of orders retained in the OMS order cache.

cmd_channel_buf.description: Capacity of the command channel feeding the OMS writer task.

kv_heartbeat_secs.description: Heartbeat interval used for service-registry KV updates.

gateway_kv_prefix.description: NATS KV prefix OMS watches to discover live gateways.

order_resync_interval_secs.description: Periodic order resync interval in seconds.

balance_resync_interval_secs.description: Periodic balance resync interval in seconds.

position_recheck_interval_secs.description: Periodic position recheck interval in seconds.

gw_exec_shard_count.description: Number of gateway executor shards used by OMS.

gw_exec_queue_capacity.description: Per-shard queue capacity for the gateway executor.

metrics_interval_secs.description: Latency metrics flush interval in seconds.

metrics_max_pending.description: Maximum number of in-flight latency samples retained.

metrics_max_complete.description: Maximum number of completed latency samples buffered between flushes.
